definitions.text: A branching, hair-like structure that grows on the bodies of birds, used for flight, swimming, protection and display.
Long hair on the lower legs of a dog or horse, especially a draft horse, notably the Clydesdale breed. Narrowly only the rear hair.
To cover or furnish with feathers; to fletch.
To adorn, as if with feathers; to fringe.
To arrange in the manner or appearance of feathers.
